code:
%% Untron V3 protocol lifecycle (infographic-ready)
%% Render (local):  npx -y @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli@latest -i docs/untron-v3.mmd -o docs/untron-v3.svg
%% Render (docker): docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/data" ghcr.io/mermaid-js/mermaid-cli/mermaid-cli:latest -i /data/docs/untron-v3.mmd -o /data/docs/untron-v3.svg

flowchart LR
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% LANE: ONE-TIME SETUP / CONFIG
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph SETUP["Setup / config (occasionally)"]
    direction TB
    Admin["Owner / Admin"]
    Realtor["Realtor (allowlisted)"]
    LP["LP (allowlisted for deposits)"]

    AdminCfg["EVM Hub config:\n- setUsdt\n- setTronReader\n- setSwapRate\n- setBridger\n- allowlists\n- pause/unpause"]
    Admin --> AdminCfg
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% LANE: TRON SIDE (SOURCE CHAIN)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph TRON["Tron lane (source chain)"]
    direction TB
    Depositor["Depositor / end user"]
    ReceiverAddr["Deterministic receiver address\n(predictable from controller+salt)"]
    TronUSDT["Tron USDT (TRC-20 contract)"]

    TronController["UntronController\n- pullFromReceivers (permissionless)\n- rebalanceUsdt (permissionless)\n- emits event hash-chain tip"]
    Receiver["UntronReceiver (CREATE2)\n- holds tokens\n- only controller can pull()"]
    EventChainTip["Controller eventChainTip (sha256 hash-chain)\nmaintained by UntronControllerIndex"]

    Depositor -->|"TRC-20 transfer(to receiver, amount)"| TronUSDT
    TronUSDT -->|"USDT credited to receiver address"| ReceiverAddr
    ReceiverAddr -. "receiver may not be deployed yet" .-> Receiver

    TronController -->|"deploy receiver if missing (CREATE2)"| Receiver
    TronController -->|"pull(token, amount) from receivers"| Receiver
    TronController -->|"emit PulledFromReceiver + other events\n(advances eventChainTip)"| EventChainTip
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% LANE: EVM HUB (DESTINATION/SETTLEMENT CHAIN)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph EVM["EVM lane (UntronV3 hub)"]
    direction TB

    Hub["UntronV3 hub (facets)\n- LeaseFacet\n- EntitleFacet\n- ControllerFacet\n- FillFacet\n- LpFacet\n(+ AdminFacet)"]

    LeaseTimeline["Lease timeline per receiverSalt\n(active lease by timestamp)\ncreated by createLease (realtor-only)"]
    PayoutCfg["Per-lease payout config\n(targetChainId, targetToken, beneficiary)\nmutable by lessee"]

    ClaimQueues["Claim queues (FIFO) keyed by targetToken\nClaim.amountUsdt is always USDT-denominated"]
    NextIdx["nextIndexByTargetToken[targetToken]\n(head cursor; filled slots deleted)"]

    LPVault["Fast-fill LP vault (principal-only)\n- deposit: allowlisted\n- withdraw: always allowed\nlpPrincipal[lp] tracks principal"]
    HubUSDT["Hub-held USDT balance\n(usdtBalance())"]

    TronReader["tronReader (ITronTxReader)\nverifies Tron tx:\n- finalized block headers\n- inclusion proof\n- success\n- parses TriggerSmartContract"]

    SwapExec["SwapExecutor (per-hub)\nexecutes arbitrary calls\n+ enforces min output"]

    Bridger["IBridger registry\nbridgers[targetToken][targetChainId]"]

    Fill["fill(targetToken, maxClaims, calls)\n- plans batch by available USDT\n- swaps once per targetToken (optional)\n- pays locally or via bridger\n- swap surplus -> filler incentive"]

    %% Lease creation + payout config
    Realtor -->|"createLease(receiverSalt,...)"| Hub
    Hub --> LeaseTimeline
    Hub --> PayoutCfg

    %% LP vault -> available USDT liquidity
    LP -->|"deposit(amount USDT)"| Hub
    Hub --> LPVault
    LPVault --> HubUSDT

    %% Claims are created by either fast or slow recognition paths
    Hub --> ClaimQueues
    ClaimQueues --> NextIdx

    %% Fill uses USDT liquidity + optional swap + optional bridge
    HubUSDT -->|"fill() consumption"| Hub
    Hub --> Fill
    Fill -->|"if targetToken != USDT:\nswap once for batch"| SwapExec
    Fill -->|"local transfer OR bridge"| Bridger
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% FAST PATH: PER-DEPOSIT PROOF -> CLAIM (PERMISSIONLESS)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph FAST["Fast path (permissionless): prove deposit -> claim"]
    direction TB
    PreEntitle["preEntitle(receiverSalt, blocks, tx, proof, index)\n- replay-protected by txId\n- enforces tx calls tronUsdt\n- enforces recipient == predicted receiver\n- attributes to active lease at tx timestamp\n- recognizedRaw += raw\n- unbackedRaw += raw\n- books fees to protocolPnl\n- enqueues claim(netOut) if > 0"]

    PreEntitle --> ClaimQueues
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% OPTIONAL ACCELERATOR: SUBJECTIVE PRE-ENTITLE (LP-SPONSORED)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph SUBJECTIVE["Optional accelerator: LP-sponsored subjective pre-entitle"]
    direction TB
    Subj["subjectivePreEntitle(txId guess, leaseId guess, raw guess)\n- debits sponsor lpPrincipal immediately\n- enqueues normal claim\n- reimburses sponsor if later preEntitle proves exact match"]
    Subj --> ClaimQueues
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% SLOW PATH: CONTROLLER EVENT HASH-CHAIN -> BACKING + CLAIMS (PERMISSIONLESS)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph SLOW["Slow path (permissionless): controller event-chain -> backing + claims"]
    direction TB
    TipTx["Tron tx calls isEventChainTip(tipNew)\n(provable successful tx)"]

    Relay["relayControllerEventChain(blocks, tx, proof, index, events)\n- proves TipTx\n- checks to == controller\n- checks provided events hash-link lastTip->tipNew\n- enqueues raw events"]
    Process["processControllerEvents(max)\n- consumes queued events\n- PulledFromReceiver:\n  - updates lastReceiverPullTimestampByToken\n  - if token==tronUsdt: repays unbackedRaw oldest-first\n  - leftover becomes profit volume\n  - profit volume -> claim under lease active at dumpTimestamp\n- UsdtSet/UsdtRebalanced/ControllerUsdtTransfer update state/PnL"]

    Relay --> Process
    Process --> LeaseTimeline
    Process --> ClaimQueues
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% DESTINATION (OPTIONAL): BRIDGE DELIVERY
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  subgraph DEST["Destination chain (optional)"]
    direction TB
    Beneficiary["Beneficiary receives\n- local transfer, or\n- bridged delivery"]
  end

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% CROSS-LANE CONNECTIONS
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% Fast path uses tronReader to verify the deposit proof
  PreEntitle -->|"uses"| TronReader
  TronReader -->|"verifies included tx\n+ returns txId,timestamp,to,calldata"| PreEntitle
  TronUSDT -->|"deposit tx is about this contract"| PreEntitle
  ReceiverAddr -->|"recipient must match predicted receiver"| PreEntitle
  LeaseTimeline -->|"active lease at tx timestamp"| PreEntitle

  %% Subjective reconciliation happens inside preEntitle (if a subjective record exists for txId)
  Subj -. "later: preEntitle reimburses sponsor if exact match" .-> PreEntitle

  %% Slow path uses tronReader to prove the isEventChainTip call happened on Tron
  TipTx -->|"proved by"| TronReader
  TronReader --> Relay
  EventChainTip -->|"tipNew equals controller state\nat proved block"| Relay

  %% Filling settles to beneficiary (directly or via bridger)
  Bridger --> Beneficiary
  Hub -->|"if targetChainId == chainid:\ntransfer(targetToken, beneficiary)"| Beneficiary

  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  %% STYLING (lightweight)
  %% -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  classDef perm fill:#E8FFF0,stroke:#0E7A39,stroke-width:1px,color:#0E7A39;
  classDef permOnly fill:#FFF3E0,stroke:#B26A00,stroke-width:1px,color:#7A3F00;
  classDef core fill:#EEF5FF,stroke:#2B62D6,stroke-width:1px,color:#133B8A;
  classDef data fill:#F3F4F6,stroke:#6B7280,stroke-width:1px,color:#111827;

  class PreEntitle,Relay,Process perm;
  class TronController perm;
  class Fill perm;

  class Realtor,LP,Admin permOnly;
  class Hub,SwapExec,TronReader core;
  class LeaseTimeline,PayoutCfg,ClaimQueues,EventChainTip,HubUSDT,LPVault,NextIdx data;
repo_description: Horizontally scalable cross-chain liquidity protocol for Tron and EVM with bulletproof security

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Untron V3协议做一个信息图级别的流程图，重点展示用户从Tron存款到最终在目标链收到资金的完整生命周期。先从最左边的Setup部分开始吧，这里涉及Owner、Realtor和LP三种角色的配置关系。
明白，Setup这个泳道标注为"偶尔执行"的配置操作。Admin通过AdminCfg可以设置USDT合约地址、TronReader、SwapRate、Bridger，还有白名单和暂停功能。Realtor和LP都是allowlisted的对吧？
对，Realtor是allowlisted才能创建lease，LP是allowlisted才能deposit。接下来是核心的Tron lane，这是source chain。Depositor通过TRC-20转账把USDT打到deterministic receiver address。
好的，我在Tron泳道里画出了Depositor到TronUSDT的转账箭头，标注"TRC-20 transfer(to receiver, amount)"。然后TronUSDT到ReceiverAddr显示"USDT credited to receiver address"。这个receiver address是predictable的，基于controller+salt？
没错，predictable from controller+salt。这里有个关键点：ReceiverAddr和UntronReceiver合约之间用虚线连接，标注"receiver may not be deployed yet"，因为可能是CREATE2预测地址但合约还没部署。
已添加虚线关系。然后TronController可以通过CREATE2部署receiver如果缺失，也能从receiver pull token。还有eventChainTip的维护，这是sha256 hash-chain，由UntronControllerIndex维护。
现在跳到EVM lane，这是destination/settlement chain。核心是UntronV3 hub，包含多个facet：LeaseFacet、EntitleFacet、ControllerFacet、FillFacet、LpFacet，还有AdminFacet。
Hub的结构我画成facets形式。LeaseTimeline是按receiverSalt管理的，active lease由timestamp决定，只能通过realtor-only的createLease创建。PayoutCfg是每个lease可配置的targetChainId、targetToken、beneficiary，lessee可以修改。
对。LP通过deposit(amount USDT)进入Hub，连接到LPVault，这是fast-fill的principal-only金库。LPVault再连接到HubUSDT，表示Hub持有的USDT余额。ClaimQueues是FIFO队列，按targetToken索引。
已画出LP deposit流程和LPVault结构。NextIdx是nextIndexByTargetToken[targetToken]，作为head cursor，filled slots会被deleted。Fill函数消耗HubUSDT，可选swap，然后本地转账或bridge。
现在需要两个主要路径：Fast path和Slow path。Fast path是permissionless的，通过preEntitle证明存款并创建claim。这个用单独的subgraph。

preEntitle的参数包括receiverSalt、blocks、tx、proof、index。它用txId做replay保护，强制tx调用tronUsdt，强制recipient等于predicted receiver，根据tx timestamp找到active lease，然后recognizedRaw和unbackedRaw都增加，协议收取fee到protocolPnl，最后enqueue claim(netOut)如果大于0。
准确。preEntitle使用TronReader来验证，TronReader返回txId、timestamp、to、calldata。还要注意TronUSDT和ReceiverAddr都要指向PreEntitle，表示deposit tx是关于这个合约的，recipient必须匹配。
已建立Fast path结构，PreEntitle连接到ClaimQueues。现在还有一个optional accelerator：LP-sponsored subjective pre-entitle，这个怎么用虚线表示？

对，Subjective是optional的。subjectivePreEntitle让sponsor LP立即debit lpPrincipal，enqueue正常claim，之后如果preEntitle证明exact match就reimburse sponsor。用虚线连接Subj和PreEntitle，标注"later: preEntitle reimburses sponsor if exact match"。
虚线关系已添加。现在Slow path也是permissionless的，基于controller event hash-chain。包括TipTx、Relay和Process三个步骤。
TipTx是Tron上调用isEventChainTip(tipNew)的交易，需要是成功的可证明交易。Relay通过TronReader证明TipTx，检查to==controller，检查提供的事件hash-link从lastTip到tipNew，然后enqueue raw events。

Process消费queued events，处理PulledFromReceiver时更新lastReceiverPullTimestampByToken，如果token==tronUsdt就按oldest-first repay unbackedRaw，leftover变成profit volume，profit volume减去在dumpTimestamp时active lease下的claim。还有UsdtSet等事件更新state和PnL。
最后需要Destination chain部分，这是optional的。Beneficiary接收资金，可以是local transfer或bridged delivery。Bridger和Hub都要指向Beneficiary。
Destination泳道已添加。Bridger到Beneficiary，Hub到Beneficiary的箭头标注"if targetChainId == chainid: transfer(targetToken, beneficiary)"。现在需要添加样式定义，用lightweight的配色。
样式分四类：perm（permissionless函数，绿色系#E8FFF0, #0E7A39），permOnly（仅白名单角色，橙色系#FFF3E0, #B26A00），core（核心合约，蓝色系#EEF5FF, #2B62D6），data（数据存储，灰色系#F3F4F6, #6B7280）。
样式已应用。PreEntitle、Relay、Process、TronController、Fill是perm；Realtor、LP、Admin是permOnly；Hub、SwapExec、TronReader是core；LeaseTimeline、PayoutCfg、ClaimQueues、EventChainTip、HubUSDT、LPVault、NextIdx是data。

检查一下Fast path的交叉连接：preEntitle使用TronReader，TronReader验证包含的tx并返回txId,timestamp,to,calldata。TronUSDT标注"deposit tx is about this contract"，ReceiverAddr标注"recipient must match predicted receiver"，LeaseTimeline标注"active lease at tx timestamp"。
这些标注都已添加。Slow path的交叉连接：TipTx通过TronReader证明，TronReader连接到Relay，EventChainTip标注"tipNew equals controller state at proved block"。
Hub的结构需要更清楚展示fill函数的逻辑。fill(targetToken, maxClaims, calls)会plan batch by available USDT，每个targetToken只swap一次（optional），然后pay locally或via bridger，swap surplus作为filler incentive。
Fill的详细逻辑已标注在节点内。HubUSDT到Fill的箭头标注"fill() consumption"。Fill到SwapExec标注"if targetToken != USDT: swap once for batch"，Fill到Bridger标注"local transfer OR bridge"。
ClaimQueues的结构要强调amountUsdt始终是USDT-denominated，不管最终payout是什么token。这是设计的关键点，保证会计一致性。
已在ClaimQueues节点内添加"Claim.amountUsdt is always USDT-denominated"。检查整体流程：Depositor转账→ReceiverAddr→可能部署Receiver→Controller pull→emit event→Fast path或Slow path→Claim→Fill→Beneficiary。
流程正确。但Subjective path的位置需要调整，它应该明确显示为accelerator，不是替代Fast path，而是并行可选。LP sponsor承担风险换取速度。
调整了Subjective subgraph的标题为"Optional accelerator: LP-sponsored subjective pre-entitle"，强调optional性质。Subj节点内标注"debits sponsor lpPrincipal immediately"，虚线回连PreEntitle显示reimburse逻辑。
TronController的权限设计需要突出：pullFromReceivers和rebalanceUsdt都是permissionless的，任何人可以调用。这很重要，因为协议不依赖特定keeper。
已在TronController节点内明确标注"- pullFromReceivers (permissionless)"和"- rebalanceUsdt (permissionless)"。整个Controller用perm样式类。
SwapExecutor的设计是per-hub的，执行arbitrary calls但enforce min output。这是安全边界，防止filler被MEV攻击。
SwapExec节点内已标注"executes arbitrary calls + enforces min output"。IBridger是registry，bridgers[targetToken][targetChainId]映射到具体bridge实现。
LeaseTimeline的查询逻辑需要理解：给定receiverSalt和timestamp，能找到active lease。这是entitlement计算的基础。PayoutCfg是per-lease且lessee可变的。
LeaseTimeline标注为"Lease timeline per receiverSalt (active lease by timestamp)"，PayoutCfg标注为"Per-lease payout config (targetChainId, targetToken, beneficiary) mutable by lessee"。
Slow path的Process函数中，PulledFromReceiver事件处理时，如果token是tronUsdt，会按oldest-first顺序repay unbackedRaw。这对应Fast path创建的unbacked claim。
理解，这是Slow path对Fast path的backing机制。leftover成为profit volume，然后profit volume要减去在dumpTimestamp时active lease下的claim，这是协议收入分配。
检查整个图的交叉lane连接是否完整。PreEntitle使用TronReader，TronReader返回验证结果；TipTx通过TronReader证明；EventChainTip状态用于Relay验证；Bridger和Hub都指向Beneficiary。
所有交叉连接已验证。添加了一个注释块说明渲染命令：local用npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli，docker用ghcr.io/mermaid-js/mermaid-cli/mermaid-cli镜像。
Receiver合约的设计是CREATE2部署，hold tokens，only controller can pull()。这个权限控制很关键，防止资金被其他人提取。
Receiver节点内已标注"UntronReceiver (CREATE2) - holds tokens - only controller can pull()"。Controller到Receiver的箭头包括"deploy receiver if missing (CREATE2)"和"pull(token, amount) from receivers"。
LPVault的设计要注意：deposit是allowlisted，但withdraw是always allowed。这是为了防止LP随意撤出影响fast-fill流动性，但允许随时退出principal。
LPVault节点内已标注"Fast-fill LP vault (principal-only) - deposit: allowlisted - withdraw: always allowed - lpPrincipal[lp] tracks principal"。
NextIdx作为head cursor的设计，filled slots被deleted，这样队列是紧凑的，不会无限增长。这是gas优化。
NextIdx标注为"nextIndexByTargetToken[targetToken] (head cursor; filled slots deleted)"。ClaimQueues是FIFO，keyed by targetToken。
TronReader的接口设计：验证finalized block headers、inclusion proof、success状态，还要parse TriggerSmartContract。这是轻客户端验证的核心。
TronReader节点内已标注"tronReader (ITronTxReader) verifies Tron tx: - finalized block headers - inclusion proof - success - parses TriggerSmartContract"。
EventChainTip的sha256 hash-chain设计，UntronControllerIndex维护。Controller emit PulledFromReceiver和其他events时advance这个tip。
EventChainTip标注为"Controller eventChainTip (sha256 hash-chain) maintained by UntronControllerIndex"。Controller到EventChainTip的箭头标注"emit PulledFromReceiver + other events (advances eventChainTip)"。
检查所有subgraph的方向：Setup是TB，Tron是TB，EVM是TB，Fast path是TB，Subjective是TB，Slow path是TB，Destination是TB。整体flowchart是LR。
所有方向已确认。整体结构是flowchart LR，三个主泳道从左到右：Setup、Tron、EVM，然后Fast/Subjective/Slow三个路径 subgraph在下方或右侧，Destination在最右。
AdminCfg的具体功能列表：setUsdt、setTronReader、setSwapRate、setBridger、allowlists、pause/unpause。这些是协议治理参数。
AdminCfg节点内已完整列出这些配置项。Admin到AdminCfg的箭头简洁标注为AdminCfg。
最后检查：infographic ready的标注已经体现在注释中，lightweight的样式已应用，所有关键术语如receiverSalt、targetToken、beneficiary、amount USDT、create2、f 0、head cursor都已在图中体现。
所有术语已核对。图的标题是"Untron V3 protocol lifecycle (infographic-ready)"。渲染命令注释提供了local和docker两种方式。
确认一下颜色编码的一致性：perm用绿色#0E7A39，permOnly用橙色#B26A00，core用蓝色#2B62D6，data用灰色#6B7280。stroke-width都是1px保持lightweight。
颜色编码已验证。perm: fill #E8FFF0 stroke #0E7A39；permOnly: fill #FFF3E0 stroke #B26A00；core: fill #EEF5FF stroke #2B62D6；data: fill #F3F4F6 stroke #6B7280。所有stroke-width为1px。
图的结构完整性检查完成。所有关键流程都覆盖：Setup配置、Tron存款、Fast证明、Subjective加速、Slow backing、Fill结算、Destination交付。权限模型清晰，permissionless函数和allowlisted角色区分明确。
图已完成。最终验证：64个节点和连接，7个subgraph，4个classDef样式，完整的Untron V3协议生命周期可视化，从配置到存款到证明到结算的全流程。
很好。这个图可以直接用于文档，开发者能快速理解协议架构。特别是Fast path和Slow path的并行设计，以及Subjective accelerator的风险权衡，都 visually clear。
建议后续可以添加一个sequence diagram版本，展示具体的时序交互，特别是preEntitle和subjectivePreEntitle的竞态条件处理。但这个flowchart版本已经很好地展示了架构overview。
同意，这个flowchart作为infographic-ready的版本已经满足需求。sequence diagram可以作为补充。现在可以定稿了。
Untron V3协议生命周期图已定稿。所有元素、连接、样式、注释完整，符合infographic-ready标准，可直接用于技术文档和演示。
